_comment: Reference only — MCP servers are registered via `claude mcp add -s user` in setup.sh (Step 9), not by merging this file. ~/.claude.json is the authoritative MCP config.

git._comment: Local git operations — history, blame, diffs. Registered by setup.sh.

codebase-memory-mcp._comment: Symbol graph for /infra-init. Binary path resolved at install time by setup.sh.

bitbucket._comment: Requires credentials — register manually: claude mcp add -s user bitbucket npx -- -y @aashari/mcp-server-atlassian-bitbucket -e BITBUCKET_USERNAME=... -e BITBUCKET_APP_PASSWORD=...
